items.name_cn:
❤【Ostrich Brown】
Loro Piana Extra pocket L19 Series Bestseller
A life without definition is the most comfortable, just like Loro Piana's material and design. Styles without complex designs, with simple and soft contours that are elegant and timeless, like a exquisite makeup case, perfectly balancing aesthetics and functionality. The leather is fine, feeling as soft as butter. The compact body has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand with a thin strap or crossbody. Sisters who love minimalist style can get this one. Simple and versatile, the simpler, the more unique. Celebrities and influencers are raving about it. It's hard not to love it with such rare leather.
Size: Small: 19×7×12cm

items.name_en: ❤️B Brand Pure Original Pocket Bag, Cowhide with Canvas, Caramel Coffee + Cream White colorway, retro and high-end yet durable. It has a bit of a cute academic vibe and a strong British tone. Can be sweet or salty, looks great handheld or crossbody! Handheld gives a better street snap vibe, the more you look, the more you like it. Large: 37×9.5×41cm

items.name_en: ❤️ Pure original checkered canvas two-tone patchwork lock bag from Brand B. The canvas material has a fresh and elegant vibe. The bag is structured and holds its shape without being soft or wrinkly. It is made using selected jacquard fine-woven canvas and leather, finished with exquisite heavy-duty visible stitching. The hardware is pure copper plated with real gold. The TB logo is truly beautiful, using the classic B-shaped lock as decoration—simple, elegant, and recognizable. The lining is full cowhide with two compartments and a zipper pocket. The capacity is huge and super spacious, enough to hold daily essentials. The adjustable calfskin shoulder strap is stylish for both shoulder and crossbody wear. It is a very trendy British retro style. This material is generally lighter than leather bags. The canvas is also lightweight, durable, and has a top-notch texture. It is a low-key luxury with substance, and you can wear it all year round. It goes with absolutely any outfit! Love it!
